_note: Always use these exact values. Do not approximate or substitute.

nau-true-blue.usage: Signature color. Must appear as the dominant color in all university communications. Use for primary text, backgrounds, and UI surfaces.

nau-gold.usage: Secondary primary color. Used for mountain graphic in logo, accent elements, CTAs on dark backgrounds. Never use as primary background at scale.

secondary._rule: Secondary colors support NAU Gold and True Blue. Never dominate the primary palette. Target an 80/20 balance favoring primary colors. Do not apply to body text.

monsoon.usage: Neutral warm gray. Use for subtle backgrounds, dividers, inactive states.

sunset.usage: Warm orange. Use sparingly for accents and visual interest.

summer-shade.usage: Forest green. Use sparingly for accents.

red-rock.usage: Red-orange. Use sparingly; avoid for error states (reserve semantic red for that).

supai.usage: Teal. Use sparingly for digital accents.

sky.usage: Light blue. Use very sparingly — must not overwhelm NAU True Blue or create visual confusion with the primary brand blue.

twilight.usage: Medium blue. Use sparingly as a supporting blue tone.

semantic._note: Semantic mappings for UI use. Derived from brand palette.
